keepers.cost_rule: Keeper costs 2 rounds earlier than the round in which the player was drafted the prior season (e.g. drafted round 8 -> kept at a round 6 cost).
keepers.eligibility: Player must have been drafted the prior season. Players added via waiver/free agency (undrafted) cannot be kept.

keepers.cost_rule: Keeper costs 3 rounds earlier than the round in which the player was drafted the prior season (e.g. drafted round 8 -> kept at a round 5 cost).
keepers.eligibility: Same as Kepners: player must have been drafted the prior season. Undrafted players cannot be kept.
keepers._note: Keeper count assumed same as Kepners (2) -- not explicitly stated when these rules were captured. Update this if Miami actually differs.
